src/main/java/es/upm/miw/iwvg_devops/cod.general_idea: Mark the instance field as final to enforce immutability of the reference.
Replace Arrays.asList().stream() with Stream.of() for creating streams from varargs.
Replace Collectors.toList() with Stream.toList() introduced in Java 16.
Replace peek() with forEach() for side-effect debugging to ensure execution and change return type to void.
Removed debug logging statements using peek() to clean up the stream pipeline.
Replaced lambda null check with Objects::nonNull for cleaner code.

src/main/java/es/upm/miw/iwvg_devops/res.general_idea: Changed the class-level request mapping from a specific path to the root path and removed the static constant.
Removed the static constant for the app-info endpoint as the endpoint logic was moved.
Removed the static constant for the system path as it is no longer used in the mapping.
Moved the application info logic to the root endpoint and expanded the response to include links to other services.
Updated the badge generation to use 'Render' instead of 'Heroku' as the provider name.

src/test/java/es/upm/miw/iwvg_devops/cod.general_idea: Replace deprecated Stream.collect(Collectors.toList()) with the modern Stream.toList() method introduced in Java 16.
Remove unnecessary assertion on the debug method call, likely because the method signature changed to void or the test intent shifted to just execution.

src/test/java/es/upm/miw/iwvg_devops/res.general_idea: Removed the unused static import for assertEquals to clean up the code.
Simplified the URI construction in testReadBadge by removing the redundant SYSTEM prefix constant.
Simplified the URI construction in testReadInfo by replacing the constant concatenation with a literal root path.
Removed the specific assertion checking the body format (splitting by '::') from testReadInfo, keeping only the null check.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the project artifact version to 1.9.0-SNAPSHOT.
Remove redundant encoding variable and inline UTF-8 values for cleaner configuration.
Upgrade maven-surefire-plugin to 3.5.2 for compatibility with newer JDKs and test frameworks.
Upgrade maven-failsafe-plugin to 3.5.2 to match surefire and ensure integration test compatibility.
Remove explicit dependency on junit-platform-surefire-provider as it is no longer needed with modern surefire.
Add Spring Boot Actuator starter to enable health and info endpoints.

README.md.general_idea: Update the GitHub Actions badge to point to the new CI workflow file name.
Remove badges for services that are no longer used or relevant (BetterCodeHub, Heroku).
README.md.human_impl: Removed lines for BetterCodeHub and Heroku badges

README.md.general_idea: Reflect the migration from Heroku to Railway in the technology list.
README.md.human_impl: Replaced `Heroku` with `Railway` in the technologies section

README.md.general_idea: Update the project version references in the assignment instructions to match the new major version.
Adjust the number of stories in Sprint 1 to reflect the removal of the Heroku deployment task.
README.md.human_impl: Changed story count from 4 to 2 and removed Heroku deployment story
